query.text: declare @tag varchar(32), @hiddenFields varchar(128) select @tag = substring('@@table', 2, 2) select @hiddenFields = rtrim(hide) from @@sysDatabaseName..voucherinfo where ma_ct = @@id exec FastBusiness$Generate$DynamicEvents @@controller, @@event, @tag, @hiddenFields, @@id, @@sysDatabaseName
